title: evolvulus arenarius
intro: Evolvulus arenarius, also known as beach morning glory, is a type of flowering plant native to tropical and subtropical regions. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Evolvulus arenarius include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve skin conditions, and provide relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Evolvulus arenarius can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
